case_title: HAYES VALLEY INN, LLC VS. LINDA BURKE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq., for Plaintiff Hayes Valley Inn, LLC., represented by Dawn Wiggins, the property manager.
Defendant, Linda Burke present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation, signed by the parties and read into the record.
Stipulation for judgment filed, See scanned doc. for details.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
